subject: Accounts Receivable Aging Report - Escalation Required
body:
Collections Team,

The AR aging report shows concerning trends. Immediate action needed:

0-30 days: $4.2M (healthy)
31-60 days: $1.8M (up 20% from last month)
61-90 days: $890K (3 large invoices)
90+ days: $2.1M (critical - up from $1.4M)

Top 5 Overdue Accounts (90+ days):
1. TechGlobal Inc: $480K - Dispute over service credits, legal involved
2. Meridian Health: $390K - Budget approval delayed, expect payment by April 10
3. Nordic Manufacturing: $320K - No response to 3 collection attempts
4. Summit Financial: $280K - Payment plan requested, awaiting CFO approval
5. Atlas Logistics: $230K - Invoice discrepancy, revised invoice sent March 12

Bad debt reserve recommendation: Increase from $350K to $520K based on historical collection rates for 90+ day balances.

I'm scheduling daily standup for the collections team starting Monday. Please come prepared with account-specific action plans.
